steps.title: Keep the verb phrase together
steps.content: The sentence says the guitar riffs 'blend with' the vocal melodies. A verb and the prepositional phrase that completes it should not be split by punctuation.

steps.title: Remove interrupting punctuation
steps.content: A inserts an unnecessary comma. B creates a fragment beginning with 'With.' C uses a semicolon before a phrase, not an independent clause. The clean verb phrase has no punctuation between 'blend' and 'with.' The answer is D.
